results.question: How many cases were decided in each term, specifically for terms after 1980?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?term_name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?case) AS ?case_count) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court> WHERE {
  ?case <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/type/Case> .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/pred/case_decided_in_term> ?term .
  ?term <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/type/Term> .
  ?term <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/pred/term> ?term_name .
  FILTER (xsd:integer(?term_name) > 1980)
} GROUP BY ?term_name ORDER BY ?term_name

per_seed.sql: SELECT "term", COUNT(*) FROM "Case" WHERE "term" > 1980 GROUP BY "term";

results.question: For each Chief Justice, how many cases had a 'precedent alteration' of '1'?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?chief_name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?case) AS ?case_count) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court> WHERE {
  ?case <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/type/Case> .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/pred/case_under_chief> ?chief .
  ?chief <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/type/ChiefJustice> .
  ?chief <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/pred/chief_name> ?chief_name .
  ?case <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-scdb-supreme-court/pred/precedent_alteration> "1" .
} GROUP BY ?chief_name ORDER BY ?chief_name

per_seed.sql: SELECT "chief", COUNT(*) FROM "Case" WHERE "precedent_alteration" = 1 GROUP BY "chief";
all_sql_attempts: SELECT "chief", COUNT(*) FROM "Case" WHERE "precedent_alteration" = 1 GROUP BY "chief";
per_seed.answer:
chief: Burger, COUNT(*): 58
chief: Rehnquist, COUNT(*): 45
chief: Roberts, COUNT(*): 30
chief: Vinson, COUNT(*): 13
chief: Warren, COUNT(*): 49

per_seed.sql: SELECT "chief", COUNT(*) FROM "Case" WHERE "precedent_alteration" = 1 GROUP BY "chief";

results.question: List the names of Justices who voted in cases where the party winning was '1' and the case was decided in the '1996' term.
results.expected_answer: WHRehnquist, JPStevens, SDOConnor, AScalia, AMKennedy, DHSouter, CThomas, RBGinsburg, SGBreyer

per_seed.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2."justice_name" FROM "Vote" AS T1 JOIN "Justice" AS T2 ON T1."justice_id" = T2."justice_id" JOIN "Case" AS T3 ON T1."case_id" = T3."case_id" WHERE T3."party_winning" = 1 AND T3."term" = 1996;
all_sql_attempts: SELECT DISTINCT T2."justice_name" FROM "Vote" AS T1 JOIN "Justice" AS T2 ON T1."justice_id" = T2."justice_id" JOIN "Case" AS T3 ON T1."case_id" = T3."case_id" WHERE T3."party_winning" = 1 AND T3."term" = 1996;

justice_name: WHRehnquist
justice_name: JPStevens
justice_name: SDOConnor
justice_name: AScalia
justice_name: AMKennedy
justice_name: DHSouter
justice_name: CThomas
justice_name: RBGinsburg
justice_name: SGBreyer

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Case: 9341 rows (from Case.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Case" (
  "case_id" TEXT,
  "case_name" TEXT,
  "date_decision" TEXT,
  "us_cite" TEXT,
  "term" INTEGER,
  "issue_area_code" INTEGER,
  "decision_direction_code" INTEGER,
  "chief" TEXT,
  "docket" INTEGER,
  "decision_type" INTEGER,
  "case_disposition" INTEGER,
  "party_winning" INTEGER,
  "maj_votes" INTEGER,
  "min_votes" INTEGER,
  "precedent_alteration" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Case:
--   case_id='1946-001', case_name='HALLIBURTON OIL WELL CEMENTING CO. v. WA', date_decision='11/18/1946', us_cite='329 U.S. 1', term='1946', issue_area_code='8', decision_direction_code='2', chief='Vinson', docket='24', decision_type='1', case_disposition='3', party_winning='1', maj_votes='8', min_votes='1', precedent_alteration='1'
--   case_id='1946-002', case_name='CLEVELAND v. UNITED STATES', date_decision='11/18/1946', us_cite='329 U.S. 14', term='1946', issue_area_code='1', decision_direction_code='1', chief='Vinson', docket='12', decision_type='1', case_disposition='2', party_winning='0', maj_votes='6', min_votes='3', precedent_alteration='0'

-- Table Justice: 40 rows (from Justice.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Justice" (
  "justice_id" INTEGER,
  "justice_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Justice:
--   justice_id='86', justice_name='HHBurton'
--   justice_id='84', justice_name='RHJackson'

-- Table Vote: 83644 rows (from Vote.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Vote" (
  "vote_id" TEXT,
  "case_id" TEXT,
  "justice_id" INTEGER,
  "vote_code" INTEGER,
  "vote_label" TEXT,
  "direction" INTEGER,
  "majority" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Vote:
--   vote_id='1946-001_86', case_id='1946-001', justice_id='86', vote_code='2', vote_label='dissent', direction='1', majority='1'
--   vote_id='1946-001_84', case_id='1946-001', justice_id='84', vote_code='1', vote_label='with majority', direction='2', majority='2'

-- Table Term: 79 rows (from Term.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Term" (
  "term" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Term:
--   term='1946'
--   term='1947'

-- Table IssueArea: 14 rows (from IssueArea.csv)
CREATE TABLE "IssueArea" (
  "issue_area_code" INTEGER,
  "issue_area_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from IssueArea:
--   issue_area_code='8', issue_area_name='Economic Activity'
--   issue_area_code='1', issue_area_name='Criminal Procedure'

-- Table DecisionDirection: 3 rows (from DecisionDirection.csv)
CREATE TABLE "DecisionDirection" (
  "direction_code" INTEGER,
  "direction_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from DecisionDirection:
--   direction_code='2', direction_name='Liberal'
--   direction_code='1', direction_name='Conservative'

-- Table ChiefJustice: 5 rows (from ChiefJustice.csv)
CREATE TABLE "ChiefJustice" (
  "chief_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from ChiefJustice:
--   chief_name='Vinson'
--   chief_name='Warren'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   Case.case_id -> ChiefJustice.chief
--   Case.case_id -> DecisionDirection.decision_direction_code
--   Case.case_id -> IssueArea.issue_area_code
--   Case.case_id -> Term.term
--   Vote.vote_id -> Case.case_id
--   Vote.vote_id -> Justice.justice_id
